new_value: Defined beacon format, rendezvous mechanisms (scheduled/hash/announce), drift compensation linear formula matching ccp_tdma.json, and join FSM procedure with cross-refs to link.h, AGENTS.md init order, and test vectors in spec/02a-tdma.md. Updated from high-level to normative IETF-style spec. Commit 8f8cd3e45
